summary: Strong test suite covering all seven functional requirements across clearly labeled TDD cycles: max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size, combined policies, summary generation, dry-run mode, and error handling. The _make_artifact factory and fixed NOW constant make fixtures clean and deterministic. Tests are organized into focused classes with docstrings, use set-based assertions for unordered comparisons, and are fully independent. The main gap is exact boundary conditions: no test checks an artifact aged precisely max_age_days (is it deleted or retained?), no test checks the size budget at exactly the limit, and the keep-latest-N path is not tested when N equals the total group size. These edge cases could hide off-by-one or strict-vs-lax comparison bugs. Error handling is well-covered including the failing delete callback path. Overall a trustworthy suite that would catch most regressions.
